description: TCEL Tenant-9 Compliance/Legal package (T9-006). Depends on Foundation + the core financial/risk/allocation packages (T9-001..005). Entities from the T9-006 schemas (ComplianceInvestigation, ManagerComplianceStatus, RegulatoryObligation - the last feeds CapitalAllocation.AI's Frozen/Restricted gates via ManagerComplianceStatusChanged); CP-001..020 control catalog as executable rules where expressible plus a traceability knowledge asset; Compliance.AI governed advisory agent. Boundary vs T9-002/003 domain compliance checks: this package owns enterprise compliance obligations, policy, conduct, financial crime, investigations, and legal holds. Omits PolicyPublished (Foundation owns) and ModelDriftDetected (Banking owns) to avoid event collisions; does NOT re-declare RecordReceived.
name: TCEL Compliance, Legal & Conduct

entities.description: A manager's compliance/allocation-eligibility status (T9-006 schema). Frozen/Restricted gates CapitalAllocation.AI.
A mapped regulatory obligation applicable to TCEL activities (T9-006 schema).

rules.name: Restricted security
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (CCO). Reject a trade in a restricted security.
rules.reasonTemplate: CP-002: trade rejected - security {securityId} is restricted (CCO).

rules.name: Personal trade preclearance
rules.description: Preventive/High (Compliance). Hold/reject an un-precleared personal trade.
rules.reasonTemplate: CP-003: personal trade held - not precleared (Compliance).

rules.name: Unauthorized bank beneficiary
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Treasury/CCO). Reject a payment to an unauthorized beneficiary.
rules.reasonTemplate: CP-004: payment rejected - beneficiary is not authorized (Treasury/CCO).

rules.name: Sanctions potential match
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Sanctions Officer). Hold and route a potential sanctions match for review.
rules.reasonTemplate: CP-005: potential sanctions match - held and routed for review (Sanctions Officer).

rules.name: Legal hold deletion
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Legal). Block deletion of a record under legal hold.
rules.reasonTemplate: CP-011: deletion blocked - the record is under a legal hold (Legal).

rules.name: Unapproved policy activation
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (CCO). Reject activation of an unapproved policy.
rules.reasonTemplate: CP-015: policy activation rejected - not approved (CCO).

rules.name: AI waiver/filing boundary
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Model Risk). Deny an agent's attempt to waive compliance or file directly.
rules.reasonTemplate: CP-016: denied - an AI agent may not waive compliance or file on its own; agents are advisory-only (Model Risk).

rules.name: Source authenticity/hash
rules.description: Evidence/High (Compliance Technology). Block approval when the source hash is missing.
rules.reasonTemplate: CP-019: compliance approval blocked - source authenticity hash missing (Compliance Technology).

capabilities.name: TCEL Compliance & Legal Intelligence
capabilities.description: Regulatory obligations, policy, conduct, financial crime, investigations, legal holds, and manager compliance status for the TCEL tenant.

agents.name: Compliance.AI
agents.description: Governed compliance officer: researches approved official sources, maps obligations to TCEL activities, monitors policies and transactions, and prioritizes cases. Advisory-only. Boundary vs BankRisk.AI/TradingRisk.AI: those own domain risk; Compliance.AI owns regulatory obligations, conduct, and financial-crime compliance.
agents.persona: You are Compliance.AI, a governed compliance officer for TCEL. You research approved official sources, map obligations to TCEL activities, monitor policies and transactions, identify gaps and suspicious patterns, prioritize cases, and produce evidence-backed recommendations - grounded ONLY in the approved sources and data you can see, citing the specific obligation and source you relied on. You never assert that a violation has legally occurred, waive a requirement, approve an exception, or file on TCEL's behalf; a licensed compliance officer and General Counsel decide those. Every recommendation states its confidence, the obligation/policy reference, assumptions, and required approvers.
sampleQuestions: Which regulatory obligations apply to a new manager's strategy?
Are there personal-trade or conflict issues open this week?
Which managers are Frozen or Restricted for allocation right now?
What sanctions or financial-crime cases need prioritization?
prohibited: assert that a violation has legally occurred; waive a requirement; approve an exception
file on TCEL's behalf; alter a policy; delete or alter investigation evidence; change its own permissions
agents.outputDisclaimer: Advisory only - Compliance.AI researches and recommends; a licensed compliance officer and General Counsel make every compliance and legal determination, not this agent.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL Compliance & Legal Control Catalog (CP-001..020)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 20 deterministic CP- controls. CP-002/003/004/005/011/015/016/019 are enforced as executable rules; the remainder (obligation-applicability governance, AML/KYC deficiency scoping, conflict/related-party enhanced approval, self-approval SoD, complaint/filing SLA timers, attestation and near-limit conduct monitoring, Board escalation) require registry lookup, cross-field comparison, workflow, or timers beyond the declarative condition model and are carried for traceability.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: CP-001 Active obligation applicability required | Governance | Block control activation without approval | Critical | CCO/Legal. CP-002 Restricted security | Preventive | Reject trade | Critical | CCO. CP-003 Personal trade preclearance | Preventive | Hold/reject | High | Compliance. CP-004 Unauthorized bank beneficiary | Preventive | Reject payment | Critical | Treasury/CCO. CP-005 Sanctions potential match | Preventive | Hold and route review | Critical | Sanctions Officer. CP-006 Critical AML/KYC deficiency where applicable | Preventive | Restrict relevant activity | Critical | AML Officer. CP-007 Conflict disclosure required | Preventive | Hold decision | High | CCO. CP-008 Related-party transaction | Preventive | Enhanced approval | High | CCO/Board. CP-009 Manager approves own exception | Preventive | Reject | Critical | CCO. CP-010 Policy expired review | Detective | Escalate owner | High | Compliance. CP-011 Legal hold deletion | Preventive | Block deletion and alert | Critical | Legal. CP-012 Investigation evidence alteration | Preventive | Deny and alert | Critical | Legal/Security. CP-013 Complaint SLA breach | Detective | Escalate | High | CCO. CP-014 Regulatory filing due | Preventive/Detective | Workflow and escalation | Critical | CCO. CP-015 Unapproved policy activation | Preventive | Reject | Critical | CCO. CP-016 AI waiver/filing boundary | Preventive | Deny action | Critical | Model Risk. CP-017 Missing required attestation | Detective | Restrict/escalate | High | Compliance. CP-018 Repeated near-limit conduct | Detective | Conduct alert | Medium | Compliance. CP-019 Source authenticity/hash | Evidence | Block approval if missing | High | Compliance Technology. CP-020 Critical issue Board escalation | Corrective | Notify and track | Critical | CCO.
